name: codetalk
display_name: CodeTalk —— 代码当初为什么这么写
description: 本地优先的代码决策溯源:就一段代码接地提问『当初为什么这么写』,用真实 commit / 测试 / PR / 会话原话作答。blame/graph/search 零 LLM、数据不出本机。

tools.name: codetalk_ask
tools.description: Grounded code Q&A: answer 'why was this code written this way' using real commit narratives and verbatim citations with SHA

tools.name: codetalk_blame
tools.description: Line-level decision provenance (zero-LLM): lists commits that touched these lines with real decisions and verbatim citations

tools.name: codetalk_graph
tools.description: Decision impact graph (timeline DAG, zero-LLM): which decision commits rippled into subsequent changes

tools.name: codetalk_search
tools.description: Topic-level 'why' recall (zero-LLM): search project memory by keyword for real why/decisions from matching commits

tools.name: codetalk_drift
tools.description: Deviation report (zero-LLM): AI tool actions vs actual git commits — shows files edited but never committed

tools.name: codetalk_prompts
tools.description: Replay your prompts to AI coding agents (zero-LLM, local-only) with soft-aligned commits

tools.name: codetalk_adr
tools.description: Export Architecture Decision Record from real git history (zero-LLM) with verbatim commit citations

project.title: 项目路径
project.description: 要接地提问的 git 项目根目录(各工具调用也可用 project 参数临时覆盖)
